# UC-10.17.14 · SonicWall DHCP Server Lease Exhaustion Warnings (SonicWall)

## Description

Branch firewalls often run DHCP for guest Wi-Fi; exhaustion looks like mysterious connectivity loss.

## Value

Remote sites stay ahead of pool sizing without on-site troubleshooting.

## Implementation

Enable DHCP server logging categories. Track pool percent used if exposed in syslog.

## SPL

```spl
index=netops sourcetype="dell:sonicwall" earliest=-24h
| where match(_raw,"(?i)DHCP.*pool|scope|exhaust|NACK|no free leases")
| stats count by host, scope
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Single value (pool % used), timechart (DHCPNACK rate).

## References

- [Splunkbase — Dell SonicWall Add-on for Splunk](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/6203)
- [Splunk Connect for Syslog — Dell SonicWall reference](https://docs.splunk.com/Documentation/SC4S/latest/)
